name: ROPNinja
description: Modern Binary Ninja ROP gadget sidebar and split-pane explorer.
longdescription: ROPNinja is a modern Binary Ninja ROP gadget explorer with a sidebar-first UI, split-pane support, syntax highlighting, regex filtering, starred gadgets, cached searches, address copying, optional auto-find, and configurable gadget search behavior. Forked from binja_rop by m4ul3r and inspired by binjago.

installinstructions.Darwin: Clone this repository into ~/Library/Application Support/Binary Ninja/plugins/ROPNinja and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Linux: Clone this repository into ~/.binaryninja/plugins/ROPNinja and restart Binary Ninja.
installinstructions.Windows: Clone this repository into %APPDATA%\Binary Ninja\plugins\ROPNinja and restart Binary Ninja.

author: Alessaba; based on binja_rop by m4ul3r
